items.description:
Inspired By @ScooterSmasher0 Design!

Go play and support Blocktales!

Blocktales By @Spaceman Moonbase
Character Made By: The official Blocktales Development Team.
UGC Recreated By @Ralxemaniac

[DISCLAIMER: THIS UGC IS FANMADE, MEANING IT IS NOT OFFICIAL.]

Buy The Full "Player" Set Here: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=Block+tales+Player&Category=1&CreatorName=Our+new+group!&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

This model is made from scratch, if it is stolen then there will be a DMCA involved.
